subcodes.first_line: O Hatem of the realms of ardor and longing, thou art even as Hatem-i-Tai in thy bestowal of coins and treasures, of steeds and fortune, of silks and precious things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حاتم دیار شوق و اشتیاق حاتم طاای درهم و دینار و اسب و بختی و دیبا و
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @exhortations and counsels, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement
